Let's settle the 'best goalscoring midfielder' debate right here, right now.

Everyone argues Lampard vs Gerrard. But when it comes to Premier League GOALS from midfield, there's a clear winner. Frank Lampard: 177 PL goals. Steven Gerrard: 120 PL goals. That's a HUGE gap. Stats don't have favourites, folks. The Chelsea legend was simply unstoppable.
